name: How to Properly File Your Utah Work Injury Paperwork
description: How to Properly File Your Utah Work Injury Paperwork - Murray

step.name: Step 1
step.text: Getting your claim moving isn't as scary as it looks. Start by reporting the accident to your supervisor right away. Next, visit a doctor to get an official medical record of your injuries. Finally, file the formal Form 122 with the state. Keeping a personal log of your symptoms helps a ton. If the paperwork feels overwhelming, we’re here to handle the heavy lifting for you.
